user_feedback:
three.module.js:4774 Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'updateWorldMatrix')
    at Box3.expandByObject (three.module.js:4774:10)
    at Box3.setFromObject (three.module.js:4694:15)
    at checkCollisions (physics.js:102:45)
    at update (game.js:103:5)
    at gameLoop (game.js:70:5)
analysis:
- Issue identified: The collision detection loop in `physics.js` assumes all obstacles have a `.mesh` property. While `Building` entities do, `Tree` entities are raw `THREE.Mesh` objects, causing `obs.mesh` to be undefined. This leads to `Box3.setFromObject(undefined)` which throws the reported TypeError.
- Files affected: `physics.js`
- Changes needed: Update the `checkCollisions` function to correctly identify the 3D object for bounding box calculation. It should check for `.mesh` (for wrapper entities) and fallback to the object itself (for raw Meshes), ensuring a valid Object3D is passed to `Box3`.
